en_title: Maverick Game’s Open-World Racer Clutch Is Set on the French Riviera, Features Monaco
cn_title: 《离合器》亮相夏日游戏节，开放世界竞速登陆法国里维埃拉
subtitle: 里维埃拉狂飙
opus_summary: Maverick Games在夏日游戏节公布开放世界竞速游戏《离合器》，设定于法国里维埃拉，包含摩纳哥等城市，故事围绕职业赛道与地下赛车展开，2027年春季登陆PS5、Xbox Series和PC。

paragraphs.en: New UK racing studio Maverick Games has revealed a first look at the location, characters, and story of its upcoming open-world action-driving game Clutch during the Summer Game Fest 2026 showcase.
paragraphs.cn: 英国新晋竞速工作室Maverick Games在2026年夏日游戏节上首次展示了其即将推出的开放世界动作驾驶游戏《离合器》的地点、角色和故事。

paragraphs.en: Clutch’s open-world world is inspired by the iconic Mediterranean coastline of the French Riviera, with the official announcement from the studio stating it will feature miles of diverse roads and terrain, and that players will be able to “weave through vibrant city streets, conquer dramatic mountain switchbacks and unleash top speed on breathtaking coastal highways.”
paragraphs.cn: 《离合器》的开放世界灵感来自法国里维埃拉标志性的地中海海岸线。官方公告称，游戏将包含数英里的多样道路和地形，玩家可以「穿梭于充满活力的城市街道，征服惊险的山路发卡弯，并在令人叹为观止的海岸高速公路上释放极速」。

paragraphs.en: “Clutch is set in Monaco and the surrounding French Riviera,” Maverick Games founder Mike Brown tells IGN. “We’ve built a version of Monaco that is actually larger than real-life Monaco. So Monaco, known for being quite dense and tight, we’ve allowed our level designers to add a little bit of space here and there – but every main road, every main landmark is present and correct. But the actual footprint of the space is larger than real-life Monaco.
paragraphs.cn: 「《离合器》设定在摩纳哥及周边法国里维埃拉地区，」Maverick Games创始人Mike Brown告诉IGN，「我们建造了一个比真实摩纳哥更大的摩纳哥版本。摩纳哥以紧凑密集著称，我们让关卡设计师在各地增加了一些空间——但每条主要道路、每个主要地标都准确无误。不过实际空间面积比真实摩纳哥更大。」

paragraphs.en: “And then that’s surrounded by a sprawling French Riviera that goes up as high as the Alps and out to the Verdon Gorge, and then as far to the west as Saint-Tropez. We have three city hubs along the coast; you’ve got Monaco, and then Cannes, and then Saint-Tropez. So a huge world to explore and one that, we think, everywhere you go there’s real beautiful things to explore and see.”
paragraphs.cn: 「然后周围是广阔的法国里维埃拉，向北延伸至阿尔卑斯山，向东至韦尔东峡谷，向西远至圣特罗佩。沿海有三个城市枢纽：摩纳哥、戛纳和圣特罗佩。这是一个巨大的世界可供探索，我们认为，无论你走到哪里，都有真正美丽的事物等待发现和观赏。」

paragraphs.en: The studio has also debuted a story trailer for Clutch, and detailed how its characters find themselves straddling a trio of different worlds, including professional circuit racing, a nighttime underground street racing scene, and intense, high-speed pursuits and getaways. With a script by Scottish TV writer Jamie Brittain (the co-creator of acclaimed British teen drama Skins), Clutch is the story of Theo Martial and his younger sister, Cass. With the guidance of his adoptive father Ludo, Theo is a star driver in the revered Riviera 1000 racing tournament – the R1K. For the purposes of Clutch, the R1K is the most prestigious event in all motorsport, and Ludo is a former champion of the tournament.
paragraphs.cn: 该工作室还发布了《离合器》的故事预告片，并详细介绍了角色如何周旋于三个不同的世界：职业赛道比赛、夜间地下街头赛车场景，以及激烈的高速追逐与逃脱。剧本由苏格兰电视编剧Jamie Brittain（英国青少年剧《皮囊》联合创作者）执笔，《离合器》讲述了Theo Martial和他妹妹Cass的故事。在养父Ludo的指导下，Theo是备受尊敬的里维埃拉1000（R1K）赛车锦标赛的明星车手。在《离合器》中，R1K是赛车界最负盛名的赛事，而Ludo是该项赛事的前冠军。

paragraphs.en: After the R1K is rocked by a tragic accident on track, however, its current custodian George McBride plans to introduce new technology to prevent any further incidents. This controversial plan splits the drivers, and eventually leads Theo to the Midnight Collective – the underground street racing community based in the area – and into an adjacent spot of trouble that leaves him owing favours to the wrong sort of people. It’s at this point, however, that Theo discovers a conspiracy at the heart of the R1K.
paragraphs.cn: 然而，当R1K因一场赛道上的悲惨事故而动摇时，其现任管理者George McBride计划引入新技术以防止类似事件再次发生。这一有争议的计划导致车手们分裂，最终将Theo引向了「午夜集体」——当地的地下街头赛车团体——并卷入了一场麻烦，让他欠下了不该欠的人情。但正是在这时，Theo发现了R1K核心的阴谋。

paragraphs.en: During Clutch we’ll race as both Theo, played by Tosin Cole (Supacell, Doctor Who), and Cass, played by Little Simz (Top Boy, Venom: Let There Be Carnage).
paragraphs.cn: 在《离合器》中，我们将扮演由Tosin Cole（《超细胞》《神秘博士》）配音的Theo，以及由Little Simz（《上层男孩》《毒液2》）配音的Cass。

paragraphs.en: “Depending on how much of a fan of UK hip hop you are will determine how excited you are about that inclusion,” jokes Brown. “But Little Simz is basically the biggest name in UK hip hop at the moment – probably the biggest female rapper in the world – and she’s also a great actor. If you’ve seen Top Boy, she plays the love interest of the main character, she was in the second Venom movie, she had a movie on Netflix last year called Steve where she starred alongside Cillian Murphy, and she also played Glastonbury main stage, as well. She was also at Coachella as well, a few weeks ago, so she’s a very, very big talent in both screen and on stage.”
paragraphs.cn: 「你对英国嘻哈的喜爱程度决定了你对这个阵容的兴奋程度，」Brown开玩笑说，「但Little Simz基本上是当下英国嘻哈界最响亮的名字——可能是全球最优秀的女说唱歌手——而且她还是一位出色的演员。如果你看过《上层男孩》，她饰演主角的恋人；她出演过《毒液2》；去年她在Netflix电影《史蒂夫》中与Cillian Murphy合作；她还登上过格拉斯顿伯里音乐节的主舞台。几周前她也在科切拉音乐节演出，所以她是一位在银幕和舞台上都极具天赋的艺人。」

paragraphs.en: French actor Grégory Montel stars as the pair’s father Ludo, and Peter Serafinowicz (who you may recall from Shaun of the Dead, or as The Sommelier in John Wick: Chapter 2) features as R1K boss George McBride. Clutch will also feature Jane Perry, who is the BAFTA award-winning voice of the lead character in 2021’s Returnal, as well as Agent 47’s handler Diana Burnwood in the most recent Hitman trilogy. She was also the voice of the in-car navigation in the first two Forza Horizon games, which is humorous considering how adjacent Clutch’s world finds itself to Forza Horizon 2 (which was also set on a segment of the French Riviera, centred around Nice.
paragraphs.cn: 法国演员Grégory Montel饰演兄妹俩的父亲Ludo，Peter Serafinowicz（你可能记得他在《僵尸肖恩》中的角色，或《疾速追杀2》中的侍酒师）饰演R1K老板George McBride。《离合器》还将有Jane Perry加盟，她是2021年《死亡回归》主角的BAFTA获奖配音，也是最新《杀手》三部曲中特工47的联络人Diana Burnwood。她还为前两部《极限竞速：地平线》游戏中的车载导航配音，考虑到《离合器》的世界与《极限竞速：地平线2》（同样设定在法国里维埃拉的一段，以尼斯为中心）如此接近，这显得颇为有趣。

paragraphs.en: It’s an entertaining coincidence that Clutch and Forza Horizon 2 find themselves such close neighbours, considering developer Maverick Games itself is within walking distance of Forza Horizon developer Playground Games.
paragraphs.cn: 《离合器》与《极限竞速：地平线2》如此相邻是一个有趣的巧合，因为开发商Maverick Games本身距离《极限竞速：地平线》开发商Playground Games仅几步之遥。

paragraphs.en: “In this specific area, it all does kinda flower originally out of Codemasters,” explains Brown, formerly of Playground Games, where he worked on a number of Forza Horizon games and was the creative director of Forza Horizon 5. “There is/was a massive developer [and] publisher just outside Leamington Spa that employed loads and loads of people, and built many, many very good racing games, and then that just builds a level of talent that then can flower out and start new studios, and it’s kinda grown out of that.
paragraphs.cn: 「在这个特定区域，一切都源于Codemasters，」曾在Playground Games工作、参与多款《极限竞速：地平线》开发并担任《极限竞速：地平线5》创意总监的Brown解释道，「在利明顿温泉附近有一家大型开发商兼发行商，雇佣了大量员工，制作了许多非常优秀的竞速游戏，这培养了一批人才，然后他们开枝散叶，创办新工作室，基本上就是这样发展起来的。」

paragraphs.en: “It is unusual and it’s unique. I don’t think there’s anything really else like it anywhere in the world, or in the games industry, where you can point to one thing – in this case, Codemasters – that then just leads to this growth and growth in what is actually quite a specialised thing, in racing games. It’s not just in video games, it is actually racing. Because there’s even Sumo Leamington, which is slightly different, but still in racing. Even these other studios that you might not immediately think of are still in Leamington doing racing, or racing adjacent work.
paragraphs.cn: 「这很不寻常，也很独特。我认为世界上或游戏行业中没有任何其他地方能像这样，从一个源头——这里就是Codemasters——衍生出如此多的增长，尤其是在竞速游戏这个相当专业的领域。这不仅仅局限于电子游戏，它实际上是赛车文化。因为还有Sumo Leamington，虽然略有不同，但仍在竞速领域。甚至那些你可能不会立刻想到的工作室，也都在利明顿从事竞速或相关的工作。」

paragraphs.en: “Anywhere else in the world, if you tell people you’re a game designer, they’re like, ‘Bloody hell, that’s interesting! What’s that like?’ In this town, if you say you work in the games industry, it’s like, ‘Yeah, obviously.’ It’s as normal as saying you’re a geography teacher.”
paragraphs.cn: 「在世界其他地方，如果你告诉别人你是游戏设计师，他们会说：‘天哪，真有意思！那是怎样的？’ 但在利明顿，如果你说你在游戏行业工作，他们的反应是：‘哦，那当然。’ 这就像说你是地理老师一样平常。」

paragraphs.en: Maverick Games revealed Clutch for the first time earlier this week. Described as a “cinematic open-world action-driving game,” Clutch will launch in Spring 2027 on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC.
paragraphs.cn: Maverick Games本周早些时候首次公布了《离合器》。这款被描述为「电影化开放世界动作驾驶游戏」的作品将于2027年春季登陆PS5、Xbox Series X|S和PC。

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 if you need a catch up on what else the video game industry has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解游戏行业还有哪些新动向，这里是2026年夏日游戏节公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Luke is a Senior Editor on the IGN reviews team. You can track him down on Bluesky @mrlukereilly to ask him things about stuff.
paragraphs.cn: Luke是IGN评测团队的高级编辑。你可以在Bluesky上通过@mrlukereilly找到他，向他询问各种事情。

audit_issues.detail: opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 97

audit_failure_reason: [summary_length] opus_summary must be 70-80 non-space characters, got 97
